decision.summary: No new action: both daily positions are now discarded for slot purposes, the weekly 72k dip remains active, and there is no cleaner late-session replacement daily to open.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 75998.54, back below 76k after failing to sustain the earlier squeeze, while open interest is contracting and shorts still dominate. That weakens the daily 77k reach enough for it to become discarded_for_slot at 13.5%, but stop-loss remains disabled so it should not be force-closed. The older 74k dip is also still just a dead discarded daily. The weekly 72k dip remains the active thesis-aligned bearish position and is still far from take-profit. There is no valid fresh daily replacement: reopening the same discarded 74k dip would violate the anti-average-down rule, the remaining bearish dailies are already too far below spot and too discounted this late in the session, and 76k reach is already fully priced above the 85% hard cap. The correct action is to hold the weekly bearish exposure, let the discarded dailies resolve naturally, and avoid forcing a late trade.
